overview: Modern, trendy brand website for Brand By Tech — a tech services company offering Software Development, Website Development, Video Editing, and Social Media Management. Features a sky blue color theme with glassmorphism effects, smooth animations, and a fully responsive multi-section layout.
features: Sky blue gradient theme with glassmorphism effects
Hero section with bold headline and CTA
Contact form with social media links
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Smooth scroll animations and hover effects
